# RIID-4654: Bridge and Detectutil

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/migrationdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to macos-provider-cli-review](../macos-provider-cli-review.md)

This slice moves the provider-neutral C4 bridge entrypoint and detect helpers.

## Moved Surfaces

- `internal/agentbridge/bridge`
- `internal/agentbridge/detectutil`
- Provider-runtime and daemon migration documentation
- Public CI for bridge run, detect, session handoff, and fail-closed probe gates

The bridge wires adapter `BuildStart` into the public `internal/process` port and session actor. Detectutil owns env override pinning, PATH fallback, version probes, and strict exit-code probe helpers.

This slice does not move runtimeactor, supervisor, controlplane, concrete adapters, native approval policy, task DB/project/local API packages, packaging, infra, secrets, or local machine state.
